name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ShotFallToKneesHelper.FtkLeanHelp
summary:
Help balancer lean amount - to help character lean over balance point of line between toes.
            Half of this is also applied as hipLean.
remarks:
Default value = 0.1f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 0.3f.
